name: Divination
summary: Diviners are masters of remote viewing, prophecies, and using magic to explore the world.

granted_power_l1_passive.name: Forewarned
granted_power_l1_passive.summary: You can always act in the surprise round even if you fail to make a Perception roll to notice a foe, but you are still considered flat-footed until you take an action. In addition, you receive a bonus on initiative checks equal to 1/2 your wizard level (minimum +1). At 20th level, anytime you roll initiative, assume the roll resulted in a natural 20.

granted_power_l1_active.name: Diviner's Fortune
granted_power_l1_active.summary: When you activate this school power, you can touch any creature as a standard action to give it an insight bonus on all of its attack rolls, skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws equal to 1/2 your wizard level (minimum +1) for 1 round. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Intelligence modifier.

higher_level_powers.summary: Familiarity boost on scrying spells; adds glyphs/info.
